textPlain: I have huge respect for Mitchell, it's impressive what he achieved.I agree with all the points of this article and would like to add one: Have a quick feedback loop. For me, it's really motivating to be able to make a change and quickly see the results. Many problems just vanish or become tangible to solve when you playfully modify your source code and observe the effect.
Previously:My approach to building large technical projects - https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=36161397 - June 2023 (27 comments)
